research_constraints: Memory-only claims avoided; explicit links or unknown markers used

backends.expected_input_format: Tokenized symbolic sequences using Moonbeam's custom absolute+relative attribute tokenizer and checkpoint/tokenizer files.
backends.expected_output_format: Generated symbolic token sequences decoded back to MIDI (continuation, conditional generation, and infilling workflows).

evidence.title: Moonbeam GitHub repository
evidence.note: Repository includes dependency installation instructions and checkpoint download instructions.

evidence.title: Moonbeam project page
evidence.note: States paper/code/pretrained weights release and Apache License 2.0 status.

evidence.title: Moonbeam paper
evidence.note: Describes custom tokenization and downstream continuation/infilling tasks.

notes: Most aligned with our first-generation backend use-case (continuation/infill).
Requires tokenization conversion bridge from current generative examples.

backends.expected_input_format: MIDI-GPT event/token representation for multitrack bar/track infilling with attribute controls.
backends.expected_output_format: Multitrack MIDI generation/infill outputs from model checkpoint and tokenizer config.

evidence.title: MIDI-GPT GitHub repository
evidence.note: Describes controllable multitrack generation/infill and bundled model checkpoints in repository artifacts.

evidence.title: MIDI-GPT AAAI paper
evidence.note: Explains controllable multitrack architecture and infill tasks.

evidence.title: MIDI-GPT Python package
evidence.note: Shows packaged tokenizer/model runtime and checkpoint format expectations.

notes: Strong controllable multitrack fit, but representation conversion work is non-trivial.
License status should be manually verified before production usage.

backends.expected_input_format: Natural-language prompt with T5 encoder and REMI-based decoder vocabulary/config.
backends.expected_output_format: Generated symbolic token sequence decoded to MIDI conditioned on text prompt.

evidence.title: Text2MIDI GitHub repository
evidence.note: Provides code and loading instructions tied to HuggingFace-hosted weights and REMI vocab.

evidence.title: Text2MIDI HuggingFace model card
evidence.note: Documents pretrained weight files and runtime loading process.

notes: Good for prompt-driven sketch generation, less direct for continuation/infill from current examples.
Prompt pathway useful but may not be best first backend for example-conditioned generation.

backends.expected_input_format: OctupleMIDI symbolic encoding for music understanding tasks using fairseq-style checkpoints.
backends.expected_output_format: Embeddings, classification/similarity/reranking signals; not primarily a MIDI generator backend.

evidence.title: MusicBERT README
evidence.note: Describes symbolic understanding scope, OctupleMIDI encoding, and checkpoint requirements.

evidence.title: Muzic project page
evidence.note: Confirms understanding/evaluation orientation and pretrained checkpoint usage.

notes: Best used as evaluator/ranker witness, not as first direct generation backend.
Tokenization mismatch with current examples is significant for direct generation.

recommended_first_backend.reason: Most aligned with continuation/infill goals and has explicit public code + pretrained checkpoint documentation for symbolic generation.
prerequisites: Validate Moonbeam checkpoint/tokenizer licensing and usage terms in repo release artifacts.
Implement deterministic conversion bridge between current generative example representation and Moonbeam tokenizer schema.
Run non-production smoke tests on tiny symbolic fixtures before any weight download phase.
alternative_candidates: midigpt for stronger multitrack control once representation bridge/licensing is validated
